name: paraglide-mcp
description: MCP server and skill for translating Paraglide JS / inlang message files — validated saves, one parallel agent per locale.

plugins.name: paraglide-translation
plugins.description: Translate Paraglide JS / inlang message files: bundles the paraglide-messages-mcp server (validated, parallel per-locale translation tools) and a skill teaching the workflow.
